stopline: blocked_until_platform_verification: do not claim live UiPath Automation Cloud execution before import and live run proof

items.review_note: Case states, owners, risk gateway, and terminal rejection path are specified.
Import shape exists as a process blueprint, not a verified UiPath export.
Robot queue item payloads include source event IDs and lifecycle logs.
Human decision tasks include available actions and evidence fields.
Core process variables and event references are mapped.
Requires manual import/build in UiPath Maestro, Orchestrator, and Action Center.
Need a live run ID, queue transaction ID, Action Center task ID, and screenshots before claiming live execution.
